meaning: 布卡武[扎伊尔东部城市](旧称科斯特曼斯维尔
examples: A road leads through the eastern commercial hub of Bukavu, Congo.
He then worried that some other bug in Bukavu could have been causing the initial tests to give a positive reading.
The ship was reported to be traveling from the town of Minova to the city of Bukavu, the capital of South Kivu province.
Some of the evidence may be anecdotal, but fact blends easily with rumour in Bukavu.
In Panzi hospital, Bukavu, Dr. Mukwege, a general surgeon continues to work tirelessly to repair these damaged women.
